news_items.headline: Cubs 2B Nico Hoerner tosses ball between legs for highlight-reel putout vs. Astros
news_items.summary: Hoerner is a 2-time Gold Glove Award winner, and he's been making an early case for why he's deserving of that kind of recognition in 2026, too.

news_items.headline: GameThread: Tigers vs. Orioles, 4:05 p.m.
news_items.summary: Detroit Tigers vs. Baltimore Orioles Time (ET): 4:05 p.m.Place: Camden Yards, Baltimore, MarylandSB Nation Site: Camden ChatMedia: Detroit SportsNet, MLB.TV, Tigers Radio Network Game 53: LHP Framber Valdez (2-3, 4.58 ERA) vs. RHP Brandon Young (3-1, 4.25 ERA)

news_items.headline: 11 years after starting pro career, Torres homers, reaches 3 times in MLB debut
Bryan Torres Homers in MLB Debut as Cardinals Slam Reds 8-1 in Game 1 of Doubleheader
news_items.summary: There were several feel good moments for the St. Louis Cardinals in game 1 of a day/night doubleheader Saturday. Bryan Torres made his Major League debut and collected his first hit and home run while Andre Pallante was sharp and Jordan Walker hit his first Great American Ball Park home run as the Cardinals beat […]

news_items.summary: Follow along as the Nats look to bounce back from back to back razor thin losses that were missed opportunities

news_items.headline: Mariners Game #53 Preview: Mariners (25-27) at Royals (20-31)
Braves vs Nationals Chat & Discussion: Grant Holmes vs Jake Irvin
news_items.summary: Game two is underway, with the Washington Nationals looking to bounce back after being walked off in yesterday’s matchup in extras. The Atlanta Braves are expecting to win the series with Grant Holmes on the mound today. Check back in for a recap on how it all unravels at Truist. First pitch is set for […]

news_items.headline: Crochet (shoulder inflammation) to face hitters Tuesday as rehab progresses
Happ gets day off, PCA batting leadoff for Cubs
news_items.summary: The Cubs are giving struggling left fielder Ian Happ the day off while moving center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong up to the leadoff spot for Saturday's game against the Astros.

news_items.headline: Manzardo's pinch-hit HR saves Williams' 11-K gem
news_items.summary: Gavin Williams matched Phillies ace Cristopher Sanchez with eight scoreless innings before Kyle Manzardo delivered a pinch-hit homer in the ninth inning to lift the Guardians to a 1-0 victory.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Cole tosses 6 scoreless after 569-day layof...
news_items.summary: Yankees ace Gerrit Cole pitched six shutout innings in his return from elbow ligament reconstruction that caused a 569-day absence.

news_items.headline: BoSox's Story undergoes sports hernia surgery
news_items.summary: Struggling Boston Red Sox shortstop Trevor Story could be out several weeks after sports hernia surgery.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Muncy exits after getting hit by a pitch
news_items.summary: Dodgers slugger Max Muncy is cautiously optimistic that he avoided a serious injury after a pitch hit him in the right wrist.

news_items.headline: Holliday sneaks 337-foot homer under foul pole
news_items.summary: Jackson Holliday hit a two-run shot in the fourth inning that went 337 feet and sneaked just over the wall and under the foul pole in left field in Friday's 7-4 win over the Tigers.

news_items.headline: D-backs' Gurriel exits game with tight hamstring
news_items.summary: Arizona left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. left the Diamondbacks' game against the Rockies because of left hamstring tightness after making a sliding catch.
